title: The Magnificent Rogue
writer: Dane Lussier, Sherman L. Lowe, Gerald Drayson Adams
actors: Lynne Roberts, Warren Douglas, Gerald Mohr
plot: A wife, under her maiden name, runs her husband's ad agency while he is away serving the forces. After his return, he wants her to be a housewife, but she wants to sign up a big account. A bet is made and whomever wins gets their ...
